title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A 3Blue1Brown video demonstrates how logarithms of images reveal hidden structure in M.C. Escher's Print Gallery through complex analysis. The video uses conformal maps and complex exponentials to explore mathematical transformations of visual art.
